title: IIM Trichy Library Information Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Indian Institute of Management Tiruchirappalli (IIM Trichy) Library Information Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 28 May 2026 on the official website of IIM Trichy. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Trichy Library Information Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age Relaxation: As per Government of India norms for PwBD and Ex-Servicemen.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline with at least second class (50% marks) and Post-graduate degree in Library and Information Science with at least a second class (50% marks) from a reputed University / Institute. At least three years' post-qualification working experience in handling library work in a reputed research/educational institute and proficiency in computer applications in the management of an RFID-based modern library in an automated, integrated and networked environment.
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline (10+2+3) with at least second class (50% marks). Post-graduate degree in Library and Information Science with at least a second class (50% marks) from a reputed University / Institute. At least three years' post-qualification working experience in handling library work in a reputed research/educational institute and proficiency in computer applications in the management of an RFID-based modern library in an automated, integrated and networked environment.

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of Rs 30,000/- per month.

selection_process: Screening of online applications Written Test / Skill Test / Trade Test / Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Trichy Library Information Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Trichy to complete the application.
